name: Rustic Well-Fried Beans (Frijoles Refritos)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried pinto, black or red kidney beans, soaked and drained
1/2 jalapeno chile pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a saucepan, add plenty of water to cover, and cook for about 1 hour until tender.
2. Drain the beans, reserving about half a cup of the cooking liquid, and set aside.
3. Heat the oil in a saucepan and add the onion. Saute for about 5 to 7 minutes until tender.
4. Add the jalapeno, cumin, and salt and cook for 1 minute more.
5. Add half of the beans and some of the reserved cooking liquid to the onion mixture. Cook over medium heat.
6. Mash the beans with a spoon, forming a course puree. Add more liquid as needed while mashing.
7. Add the remaining beans and continue to mash the mixture.
8. Cook for 15 to 20 minutes, then stir in the cilantro and Tabasco sauce.
